creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194891
py-scp-take-maintainership.patch

Hello,

the maintainer has been reset because his e-mail address is no longer reachable. I would like take maintainership of this port because this Python package is required by the net-mgmt/py-napalm port that I maintain.

If the previous maintainer is reachable by e-mail again he can contact me to get his maintainer status back.
